name: Marumi FS PLUS Lens Protect
description:
Brand-new basic Lens Protect model with a water-repellent function. Optical white glass with fingerprint resistance
98.5% high transmittance. Thin aluminum non-rotating frame structure.

features.Key Features:: Optical white glass with a water-repellent and fingerprint-resistant performance | High transmittance approximately 98.3% (400-700nm average rate) | Eight layers of Anti-reflection coating sustains a reflection rate 0.5% (420-680nm average) | Realized a thin aluminum frame to avoid vignetting even with a wide-angle lens | Made in Japan
